metadata.title: Enrique Becerra — Tech Architect Lead · Magnolia CMS, Java, Next.js
metadata.description: Tech Architect Lead at VASS with 8+ years of experience in Magnolia CMS, Java/Spring, Next.js and enterprise-scale web architectures. Coordinator of the VassNolia guild.
